//: Type-check config for `npm run check`. Extends the Next-managed tsconfig but narrows `include` to hand-written source. The base config pulls in Next's generated route validators under .next/types and docs/**/types; those are gitignored build output and currently fail under the TypeScript 6 beta (unused @ts-expect-error directives), so they are excluded here. `next build` still type-checks routes.
